evidence.source_text: Machine learning engineer with 4.7 years of experience building ML-powered features in production.

evidence.claim: Led team migration from keyword-search to embedding-based retrieval
evidence.source_text: Recently, I led the team that migrated our keyword-search-based product to embedding-based retrieval.
Implemented a RAG-based customer support chatbot integrated with our existing ticketing system.

evidence.claim: Built document ingestion pipeline using OpenAI embeddings and Pinecone
evidence.source_text: Built the document ingestion pipeline (chunking, embedding via OpenAI embeddings, storing in Pinecone)

evidence.claim: Optimized answer-generation layer by fine-tuning a smaller model for cost control
evidence.source_text: answer-generation layer (initially GPT-4, then a fine-tuned smaller model for cost control).

evidence.claim: Designed evaluation framework using BLEU, ROUGE, and human-in-the-loop scores
evidence.source_text: Designed the evaluation framework with both automatic metrics (BLEU, ROUGE) and human-in-the-loop quality scores.

evidence.claim: Reduced average ticket resolution time by 31%
evidence.source_text: Deployment cut average ticket resolution time by 31% for the supported categories.

evidence.claim: Proficiency in various ML tools and frameworks including MLflow, PyTorch, gRPC, Qdrant, and Haystack
evidence.source_text: Skills: MLflow... PyTorch... gRPC... Qdrant... Haystack

evidence.claim: Believes retrieval problems are evaluation problems in disguise
evidence.source_text: I've learned that most retrieval problems are actually evaluation problems in disguise.

evidence.claim: Prioritizes learning through shipping real systems under production load
evidence.source_text: my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.
